title: sterculia multiovula
intro: Sterculia multiovula, also known as the African locust bean tree, is a plant species belonging to the family Sterculiaceae, native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sterculia multiovula include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections, such as wounds and skin conditions. Sterculia multiovula can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or paste, and is often used in herbal remedies to support overall health and well-being.
